results.name: teo
results.description: Earth Kingdom refugee with a flying wheelchair.

results.name: terisian isles
results.description: An archipelago in the north of Dominaria. Its islands are remnants of the old continent of [Terisiare](terisiare), flooded in the Thaw that followed the World Spell.

results.name: terisiare
results.description: A continent in the North of Dominaria, now flooded and turned into an [archipelago](terisian-isles) by the Thaw following the World Spell.

results.name: tevesh szat
results.description: Initially Tev Loneglade, around the time of the Fall of Serpadia he became demonic and renamed himself to this new name.

results.name: text change
results.description: Cards that directly change the text of a card.

results.name: the abyss
results.description: A distinct plane, one that's connected to several other planes.

results.name: the benefactors
results.description: A faction of Duskmourn survivors known for marking the locations of safe zones and supply caches with a flame symbol.

results.name: the boulder
results.description: He's ready to bury you in a rockalanche.

results.name: the celestus
results.description: A massive magical orrery located in the Kessig Woods.

results.name: the curator
results.description: Museum curator from the Doctor Who episode "The Day of the Doctor"

results.name: the doctor
results.description: Cards that represent The Doctor, the eponymous lead of Doctor Who.

results.name: the edge
results.description: The "exoverse" where Edge of Eternities takes place.

results.name: the elderspell
results.description: The spell Nicol Bolas used in War of the Spark to harvest the sparks of Planeswalkers.

results.name: the envoy
results.description: A character depicted on the cards from the Artist Series: Sidharth Chaturvedi Secret Lair Drop.
